violations.text: The presence of insects is not controlled as evidenced by numerous live small flies throughout the establishment. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. PCS unknown, believed by PIC to be Big Blue Bug with service monthly. Service must be increased to weekly until insect issue is resolved. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Fruit slicer (mandolin) observed stored on the wall of the mop sink corner. Equipment and utensils must be stored in a clean dry location, where they are not subject to dust or splash, and at least 6 inches above the floor. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

Single service items observed stored on the floor in the back area. Single service items are not being stored properly in their original protective package and/or are stored on a surface that is not clean in the employee toilet room now used for storage. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026

The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have peeling deliver plastic on them, and must be removed. The non-food contact surfaces of the cabinets in the front service area have an accumulation of dust, dirt, dried liquid residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the toilet room, now used as a storage area, and having a negative impact on the storage of necessary items. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 04/09/2026

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue, especially the area beneath the 3 bay sink, The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/30/2026
The floor in the back area is in poor repair, with tiles missing. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/13/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of soil residue and biofilm. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The coving near the ice machine is in poor repair, detached from the wall. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The walls and ceiling in the ice machine area have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2025
English Responding to Vomiting and Diarrhea Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

The hand washing sink in the toilet room is lacking proper signage. A sign or poster reminding food employees to wash their hands must be posted at all hand sinks used by food employees. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

Food contact surfaces of the ice machine were observed with an accumulation of sludge and biofilm. The food surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025

Boba was observed held at 73-78 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Boba is to be kept hot, cold, or establishment is to request Time as a Control. Instructions given to PIC. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Ice scoop observed inside the ice bin with the handle in the ice. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the refrigerator, prep unit, and cupboards have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/16/2025
Coving is in poor repair (detached from the wall) near the ice machine. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025

The walls and ceiling in the back area have an accumulation of soil residue and dried liquid. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/26/2025
